doc: BSH-HMS Phase 2 — n8n Workflow Baseline & Verified State
purpose: Ground-truth snapshot of the 12 BSH-HMS n8n workflows: their pre-existing state, the bsh-hms tag applied this session, industry-gate inspection, and proof that no sacred workflow was touched.
generated_by: Claude Code autonomous session (BSH-HMS finish-everything-no-push mission, Section 2)

premise_correction.premise_in_task: Find/execute workflow creation scripts to CREATE 12 BSH workflows.
premise_correction.finding: The 12 BSH-HMS workflows ALREADY EXIST (created in prior sessions, updatedAt 2026-05-28). No creation scripts were located, and none were needed. Per the no-duplicate guardrail, this session VERIFIED + TAGGED them instead of recreating.
premise_correction.label: VERIFIED-API

tag.name: bsh-hms
tag.note: The n8n instance had ZERO tags before this session. bsh-hms is the first tag. Applied to all 12 BSH workflows via PUT /workflows/{id}/tags (additive — does not alter node graph or active state).
tag.label: VERIFIED-API

industry_gate_summary.label: VERIFIED-API
industry_gate_summary.delegator_note: These 4 are thin 2-3 node wrappers that delegate to OMEGA / MEDICA / Doctor-Avatar and reference the BSH tenant directly. They have no inline 'Is healthcare_hospital?' node, so their gating depends on (a) the called agent's M2 firewall industry gate and (b) the Supabase bsh_* DB triggers verified in Section 1. RECOMMENDATION: before activating any delegator for MULTI-tenant use, add the inline gate to match the other 8. For the single-tenant BSH demo this is acceptable because they target bsh-demo directly.

sacred_safety.label: VERIFIED-API
sacred_safety.method: Captured updatedAt for all 9 sacred workflows + Doctor Avatar BEFORE tagging, re-read AFTER tagging the 12 BSH workflows. All identical.
sacred_safety.observation: fvXs1Z94tvje0QfY (Video Intelligence Orchestrator) carried updatedAt=2026-05-29 (today) at the moment I captured the baseline — i.e. it was touched by concurrent activity (another session or cron) BEFORE this session began. This session did NOT modify it; its timestamp is identical before and after my tagging. Flagged for honesty.
